data.body: 6fe2 COMMITTED (7a9ccf7) + PUSHED to Gerrit as change #764 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/764). Trailers OK: rebar-ticket 6fe2, Change-Id I5c2b5610, Signed-off-by Joe Oakhart <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>. 16 files (14 modified + 2 new tests). make typecheck clean (327 files). NOTE: pre-commit hook needs venv on PATH (mypy) -- always 'source .venv/bin/activate' before git commit. Gates LLM-Review + Verified now pending on #764. Proceeding to e622 (stacked on 6fe2) while votes accumulate.
